content.full_text:
FPPC

MAY 2 0 1991
9:58 am

OFFICE OF THE

CITY ATTORNEY

JOHN R. CALHOUN
CITY ATTORNEY

OF

LONG BEACH

ROBERT E. SHANNON
ASSISTANT

MAIN OFFICE
City Hall
333 West Ocean Boulevard
Long Beach, California 90802
(213) 590-2200

WORKERS' COMPENSATION SECTION
(213) 590-2245

May 16, 1991

Mr. John Wallace
Counsel, Legal Division
California Fair Political
Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Re: Confirmation of Advice Concerning
Questionnaire

Dear Mr. Wallace:

Long Beach Councilmember Wallace Edgerton has
requested that we receive written confirmation from your
office regarding your recent telephonic advice to that a
proposed questionnaire from Councilman Edgerton's office
prepared and sent at public expense would not be a mass
mailing prohibited by Political Reform or FPPC
regulations. Enclosed for your information and use are
photocopies of (1) the proposed questionnaire, (2) the
letter of transmittal and (3) the envelope in which the
questionnaire will be mailed. The contents of all of these
documents were read to you verbatim during our initial
telephone conversation last week.

If you have any questions or require additional
information, please contact me at (213) 590-2201. Thank you
for your cooperation.

Very truly yours,

JOHN R. CALHOUN
CITY ATTORNEY

JRC:fl
Enclosures
cc: Councilman Wallace Edgerton

[City seal]

OFFICE OF THE CITY COUNCIL
CIVIC CENTER PLAZA
333 WEST OCEAN BOULEVARD
LONG BEACH, CALIFORNIA 90802

WALLACE EDGERTON
COUNCILMAN SECOND DISTRICT

213/590-6684

[Handwritten note in top right corner: "Please 3 Fund this"]

MAKE CERTAIN THIS PORTION IS ON OUTSIDE WHEN MAILED.

Please take a few moments to complete this survey contained on the opposite side and return to the second district council office.

THANK YOU.

[At bottom right: "Attached: Cameras" with vertical tally marks]

SECOND DISTRICT SURVEY

PLACE SURVEY

Questions THROUGHOUT

ENTIRE PAGE -

SECOND DISTRICT SURVEY

YES    NO

1.  ARE DRUGS AND DRUG ACTIVITY AND/OR
    GANGS A MAJOR PROBLEM IN YOUR NEIGHBORHOOD?

2.  IF SO, DO YOU FEEL THAT ADDITIONAL FUNDING
    IS NEEDED TO PROVIDE MORE POLICE PRESENCE?

3.  WOULD YOU SUPPORT A MEASURE FOR INCREASED
    TAXES TO PROVIDE MORE POLICE PRESENCE?

4.  DO YOU FEEL THAT OUR POLICE VISIBILITY,
    RESPONSE TIME AND ATTITUDES HAVE IMPROVED
    OVER THE LAST SIX MONTHS?

5.  WOULD YOU BE INTERESTED IN STARTING A
    NEIGHBORHOOD WATCH PROGRAM (OR RE-ACTIVATING
    AN OLD ONE) ON YOUR BLOCK?  (IF "YES" BE SURE
    TO INCLUDE INFORMATION AT BOTTOM OF PAGE)

6.  IN YOUR OPINION DOES HIGHER DENSITY LEND ITSELF TO HIGHER CRIME
    AND DETERIORATION IN NEIGHBORHOODS?

7.  OUR CITY, INCLUDING THE 2ND COUNCILMANIC DISTRICT,
    HAS BECOME EXTREMELY DIVERSE REFLECTING MANY
    ETHNIC GROUPS, LIFESTYLES, AND ECONOMIC STATIONS.
    DO YOU BELIEVE THE CITY SHOULD DO EVERYTHING
    POSSIBLE TO ATTEMPT TO HAVE THESE GROUPS TO
    LIVE TOGETHER IN HARMONY?  IF SO, WHAT WOULD YOU
    SUGGEST THE CITY OR COUNCIL SHOULD DO?

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________

8.    WHAT DO YOU BELIEVE TO BE THE MOST CRITICAL ISSUE IN THE
2ND DISTRICT AND IN YOUR OPINION, HOW SHOULD THIS ISSUE
BE APPROACHED?

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________


PLEASE PROVIDE THE FOLLOWING INFORMATION


NAME _________________________________ PHONE NUMBER_________________

ADDRESS ________________________________________________________________

The image appears to be a blank or nearly blank page with only very faint, illegible text marks at the top and bottom margins. The vast majority of the page is white/blank space.

[illegible]

[illegible]

WALLACE EXOSKELETON
COUNCIL OF SECOND UNIVERSITY
PUBLIC AFFAIRS OFFICE
335 WEST OCEAN BLVD.
LONG BEACH, CA 90802

The image appears to be a mostly blank page with very faint or minimal text that is not clearly legible. I can see what appears to be a small black triangular mark or corner fold in the bottom right of the page, but no clearly readable text content to transcribe.

sections.question:
s THROUGHOUT

Entire Page

SECOND DISTRICT SURVEY

YES    NO

1. ARE DRUGS AND DRUG ACTIVITY AND/OR GANGS A MAJOR PROBLEM IN YOUR NEIGHBORHOOD?

2. IF SO, DO YOU FEEL THAT ADDITIONAL FUNDING IS NEEDED TO PROVIDE MORE POLICE PRESENCE?

3. WOULD YOU SUPPORT A MEASURE FOR INCREASED TAXES TO PROVIDE MORE POLICE PRESENCE?

4. DO YOU FEEL THAT OUR POLICE VISIBILITY, RESPONSE TIME AND ATTITUDES HAVE IMPROVED OVER THE LAST SIX MONTHS?

5. WOULD YOU BE INTERESTED IN STARTING A NEIGHBORHOOD WATCH PROGRAM (OR RE-ACTIVATING AN OLD ONE) ON YOUR BLOCK? (IF "YES" BE SURE TO INCLUDE INFORMATION AT BOTTOM OF PAGE)

6. IN YOUR OPINION DOES HIGHER DENSITY LEND ITSELF TO HIGHER CRIME AND DETERIORATION IN NEIGHBORHOODS?

7. OUR CITY, INCLUDING THE 2ND COUNCILMANIC DISTRICT, HAS BECOME EXTREMELY DIVERSE REFLECTING MANY ETHNIC GROUPS, LIFESTYLES, AND ECONOMIC STATIONS. DO YOU BELIEVE THE CITY SHOULD DO EVERYTHING POSSIBLE TO ATTEMPT TO HAVE THESE GROUPS TO LIVE TOGETHER IN HARMONY? IF SO, WHAT WOULD YOU SUGGEST THE CITY OR COUNCIL SHOULD DO?

8. WHAT DO YOU BELIEVE TO BE THE MOST CRITICAL ISSUE IN THE 2ND DISTRICT AND IN YOUR OPINION, HOW SHOULD THIS ISSUE BE APPROACHED?

PLEASE PROVIDE THE FOLLOWING INFORMATION

NAME ________________________________ PHONE NUMBER_____________________

ADDRESS _____________________________________________________________

333 WEST OCEAN BLVD.  
LONG BEACH, CA 90802

The image you provided is mostly blank, with very little visible content. If you have another page or another section of this document that you would like transcribed or analyzed, please provide it.
